item.title: Even the darkest night must turn to day.
item.description:
I hate the whole “things happen for a reason,” especially when things like this happen. But maybe this did happen for a reason.
Dog tax.
item.dc:creator: GritsForLife

item.title: My back hurts when I cough wrong.
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: YouTube has now begun skipping videos altogether for users with ad blockers
item.description:
https://www.androidpolice.com/youtube-videos-skip-to-end-if-you-use-an-ad-blocker/
it's easy as wiping your butt. Just copy and paste the link or click the box in the middle where it tells you to click and hit start. it will show up in your downloads folder. no ads, no interruptions, no overlays. just video. at the highest quality. it's also able to get that 'enhanced 1080p' bullshit they're trying to pull. here's the open source https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp for you all you nerds (i envy you) here's the direct link for the GUI for us ignorant folk that need buttons. https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp.exe ezpz lemon fuck your profits.
If you're having trouble with ads or watching videos that you're supposed to be able to in your country, (otherwise you'll need to use a vpn) you can use this nifty little ripper.
item.dc:creator: DietLoki

item.title: Hazel is a not a fan of being burped
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Memes vol 291
item.description:
I’d do anything for booty shorts with military secrets on the butt
Be honest
*me pulling up to work in the sluts train car*
If ya nasty
I used to play mancala by myself because I’m an only child
I had a leash as a kid. Here’s the way I see it: if the kid who fell into the gorilla enclosure had been wearing a leash, Harambe would still be here.
“It’s not my fault I have a heavy flow and a wide set vagina!”
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Memes vol 292
item.description:
Thanks, Sonic! (The only thin blue line he cares about is his taint)
“The chest fluff everyone thinks are tits”
Imagine putting the baby down for a nap and hitting your shin but you can’t scream cuz you just got the little rascal to sleep
I hate Rachel but her face was hilarious in this scene
Craig
Sorry
Full house! (Its because it’s the only on I’ve seen)
Sorry again
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax. I’m so sad because this onesie doesn’t fit anymore :( my ass is too thicc (that’s a joke)

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
every time
legend
better than microwaving fish in the break room
just did
what a great idea
same but a dude
note to self: don't become a hostage negotiator
i'm arriving
no thank you?
do it
is that 'chode' you're wearing?
no
good ole maglite
as is tradition
and on that note
that's it for me... have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.60 A LITTLE BIRDY TOLD ME
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Ivan Shavrin
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Fmr2mars - Music Makers YouTube: https://youtu.be/TsLoT1GczWA?si=FIM-6VIR_xI2pTuT Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2TdYrxyc6eohp8VWTSEUDc?si=6f5ddf1784f24a95
Max Grecke
Ian McQue
Mathieu Nozières
RenaArt
Sixmorevodka Studio
Matt Sanz
Yibing Jiang
Celine Xiaoling
Erin Arik
Jaime Martinez
Daniel Moudat
Like Ice
Waldemar Wagner
Pavel Oleinik
Olya Anufrieva
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra, @DerpyVaz ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Confession Time
item.description: I like seeing a Nazi get punched as much as the next guy… but I use this platform for maymays… *EDIT* It seems like there is a bit more backstory as to why the Imgur community is posting these gifs. I assumed it was just a Memorial Day thing but I guess it’s kind of related to imgur and its mod choices?
item.dc:creator: Rykochet09

item.title: Hello world! My egg cracked open!
item.description: Hello world! My egg cracked, and I'm now free! It's lovely to meet you all! So, I'm aware that the waiting list for the gender clinics in the UK are extreme, So I'm wondering if any of you beautiful folk can point me in the direction of alternative sources for T Blockers and E, please feel free to DM me any relevant info! I love you all <3
item.dc:creator: sythenelexia

item.title: I made an emotional support chicken for my daughter's friend. She's beginning to come out, so I tried to incorporate the lesbian flag into it, is it too subtle?

item.title: In 1925, Coca Cola released a souvenir keychain in the shape of a swastika. Before the Nazis came along, the swastika symbolized good luck in the United States, as it did in India
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth
